channel.title: NGUYEN QUANG DUNG Blog
channel.description: Technical blog on AI, ML, and software engineering.

item.title: Launching Physics-Informed Learning Lab
item.description: I just deployed a notebook-driven website for learning and exploring physics-informed machine learning, from PINNs fundamentals to operator learning and frontier research notes.

item.title: Hello World — Why I Started This Blog
item.description: A brief introduction to my blog, what I'll be writing about, and why sharing knowledge matters as an AI/ML engineer.
